title: 3 Beds 2 Baths Apartment
description:
3×2 Student Apartment Near BYU | Shared Bedrooms

Live just steps from BYU in a 3-bedroom, 2-bath apartment designed for easy student living. You get the privacy of your own bedroom while sharing updated, comfortable common spaces with roommates.

Apartment Features
• Private bedroom with plenty of storage
• Shared bathroom with one roommate
• Large full kitchen
• New black appliances
• Dishwasher & garbage disposal
• Vinyl flooring
• External double vanity
• Tub/shower combo
• New flat-screen TV

Community Perks
• Fully furnished
• Roommate matching available
• On-site management
• On-call maintenance
• Gigabit internet (Google Fiber available)

Perfect if you want a place that’s close to campus, social, and move-in ready.

Message me for pricing, availability, or to get started on the application.

Share room 
Im selling my contract !!
ATTENTION March and April  is FREE with a signed and accepted contract. ( you can renew in August if you want ) I need to sell it ASAP! title: 1 Bed 1 Bath - Apartment
description:
1 bed/1 bath apartment for rent. One street away from the engineering building, south BYU campus. Very conveniently located for married couples and the ward is amazing. 2 very large closets for storage. 

Utilities not included in the rent. W, S, T are $20 and electricity/gas is based on usage. This is a lease takeover so please reach out to me to tour. Apply directly with Legend Real Estate and mention my name. Available December 31st.

title: 1 Bed 1 Bath - Apartment
description:
Apartment Highlights: 
• Spacious 1 Bed, 1 Bath units for all your living needs
• high-speed internet (1 GB) 
• Fully equipped kitchen with refrigerator, oven, stove, and microwave
• Convenient in-unit washer and dryer available for rent
• Generous 794 sq. ft. of living space

Community Perks:
• Pool and hot tub for relaxing and unwinding
• Stay active at our 24/7 gym
• Play and compete on our new basketball/pickleball court
• 2 community grills perfect for outdoor gatherings
• Reserved parking for stress-free convenience
• A new park for kids to enjoy

Neighborhood Perks Near By:
2-minute drive from shopping center: Megaplex theater
Top golf 
Brooker's ice-cream and more!
10-minute drive to UVU and BYU campuses
45-minute drive to Salt Lake City Airport

Come and make The Vine your home—where comfort meets community.

- Passaro Leasing
